expected_behavior: Treat the bare Chinese name as a Partner trigger.
Ask for the target repo or task if the user has not provided enough scope.
Explain that Partner coordinates Claude Code planning, polish, review, and Codex implementation.
Do not start Claude Code until there is a concrete repo and stop condition.
must_not: Ignore the prompt because it does not include Claude Code explicitly.
Start a high-permission Claude Code session without explicit skip or bypass wording.
Commit, push, publish, tag, or change repository visibility.

prompt: Claude Code 已经在同一个会话里给过 plan 了，你实现后别重新开新会话，继续让它 polish 和 review。
expected_behavior: Reuse the existing Claude Code session for polish and review when it is recoverable.
Send a bounded handoff with changed files, diff stat, checks, and open risks.
Explain if a fresh Claude session is unavoidable and why the token tradeoff is worth it.
Prefer Codex-side verification over a cold-start Claude review when the existing session is stuck and the diff is low risk.
must_not: Start a new claude -p review-only session by default.
Make Claude rebuild project context from scratch when the same session is still available.
Keep prompting a stalled Claude session without a stop condition.

prompt: 用 Claude Code goal 先帮我规划一个小型前端项目，然后你 Codex 从零实现。
expected_behavior: Enter the concrete repo or ask for one if no target exists.
Check git status before starting Claude Code.
Start Claude Code in plan mode and send /goal with a clear completion condition.
Use Claude Code for planning only, then Codex implements the code.
must_not: Use claude -p to send /goal.
Let Claude Code do bulk implementation by default.
Commit, push, or deploy without explicit instruction.

prompt: 在同一个 Claude Code 对话里先出 plan，你 Codex 实现后再让 Claude 优化 UI，最后同会话跑 /codex:review。
expected_behavior: Prefer one Claude Code session for plan, polish, and final review when the task is small or medium.
Have Codex implement the plan outside Claude Code and run relevant checks.
Send Claude Code a bounded handoff with plan, changed files, diff stat, check output, and key file snippets.
Ask Claude Code for prioritized UI and interaction polish before running /codex:review.
must_not: Open a fresh Claude Code session for every phase by default.
Paste the whole repo or huge diffs into Claude Code when a compact handoff is enough.
Skip the UI polish phase for frontend work unless the user asks for a minimal loop.

prompt: 让 Claude skip 做完这个 UI 交互优化，你监控它，最后把结果修到可提交。
expected_behavior: Treat skip as explicit permission to use bypassPermissions for the Claude Code session.
State repo path, git status, scope, and stop condition before launch.
Monitor PTY output, claude agents JSON, transcript structure, task files, and repo evidence.
Have Codex inspect diffs and run the fastest relevant checks before reporting ready-to-commit status.
must_not: Allow skip mode to commit, push, deploy, publish, send external messages, or touch secrets.
Trust Claude Code's completion text without checking repository evidence.

prompt: Claude 里跑 Codex Review 验收一下当前 diff，发现问题你来修。
expected_behavior: Use Claude Code for the final /codex:review pass when available.
Prioritize bug, regression, risk, and missing-test findings.
Let Codex apply accepted fixes and rerun relevant checks.
Report remaining findings and whether the work is ready to commit.
must_not: Treat style-only suggestions as blockers unless they affect user-facing quality.
Commit by default after review.

prompt: 用鲁班和达尔文的方式把搭子.skill 做发布前验收，先跑本地检查，不要公开发布。
expected_behavior: Treat this as publish readiness, not ordinary code review.
Run the repository readiness check before claiming the skill is publishable.
Apply Darwin-style validation: name the edited dimension, run tests, and keep only improvements.
Report whether the repo is ready to publish, but do not change repository visibility or create a release without explicit instruction.
must_not: Make the private repository public without a separate explicit instruction.
Create a release tag or publish to a skill registry without a separate explicit instruction.
Skip test prompts and rely on static README edits only.
Use git reset --hard as the default rollback path.

prompt: Codex 实现完后，把当前 diff 用 Partner handoff 模板交给同一个 Claude Code 对话做 UI polish。
expected_behavior: Use references/handoff-template.md as the shape of the message back to Claude Code.
Include task, Claude plan, changed files, diff stat, check output, risks, and scope boundary.
Ask Claude Code for prioritized UI and interaction findings rather than a broad rewrite.
Have Codex apply accepted fixes and rerun relevant checks.
must_not: Paste the whole repository when a bounded handoff is enough.
Ask Claude Code to commit, push, deploy, publish, or touch secrets.
Treat Claude polish text as verified without repo evidence.
